label: Garden Layout
items: Fixed layouts rendering as an empty 2D canvas — seeded shapes now draw correctly and both views always match.
The 3D view now opens framed on your garden instead of a corner, and 2D opens fitted to your whole canvas.
Phones now get a clean view-only layout viewer — pan, zoom, switch 2D/3D and tap shapes for details; card actions moved into a ⋮ menu so tapping a layout opens it reliably.
Editor toolbar no longer overflows on smaller desktop windows.
